name: Forbidden pants curse
description:
!!!⚠️WARNING FOR HYPER AND GROWTH/EXPANSION ⚠️!!!

A kinda stupid bot that I've came up with, the basic idea is that the "forbidden pants" make the ass actually bigger and not just make them look bigger, as you also prolly noticed the bot is "All POV", for people that may sometimes feel like they want to be a girl to have a taste of the curse for themselfs. I'm thankful guys that you have used my beach bot so much, altough I wish that also Marla got some more spotlight. Idk what else to say, have fun with the bot. Kisses 😘 ❤️

Also on a quick note, I will change the pfp to something else, something where there are MORE asses. I may also do a version just for guy personas, "forbidden pants" for men and if y'all want, I could make the collab of the two, tell me in the comments if you would like that.

The gif that gave me the idea to even make this bot: Warning for big ass

Update 1: Oops, I forgot to add the scripts, silly me.

Update 2: Changed the pfp to include more possibilities for the colors of pants
creator: Machoker1
